channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lindsey Graham dies after brief illness; FBI assists local authorities
item.description: Lindsey Graham, the 71-year-old South Carolina Republican senator, has died from a 'brief and sudden illness' following a trip to Ukraine. His office confirmed the death on Saturday, though details of...

item.title: Wife pays heartfelt tribute to late footballer Jayden Adams
item.description: Aqueelah Chloe, wife of late South African footballer Jayden Adams, shared a deeply personal tribute on Instagram following his sudden death. Jayden, who recently played for Bafana Bafana at the 2026 ...

item.title: Stanley Nwabali rejoins Chippa United ahead of new season
item.description: Chippa United have officially confirmed the return of Nigerian international goalkeeper Stanley Nwabali to the club, ending speculation about his future. The 30-year-old shot-stopper, who previously p...

item.title: Government scales down repatriation efforts after over 53,000 foreigners deported or repatriated
item.description: The South African government has processed over 53,000 foreign nationals through deportation or voluntary repatriation programs since mid-June 2026, according to Justice and Constitutional Development...

item.title: LPG importers warn of potential nationwide gas shortage due to pricing issues
item.description: The LPG Importers Association of Pakistan (LPGIAP) has issued a warning about an impending nationwide liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) shortage if the government does not intervene immediately. In a lett...

item.title: Israeli airstrikes in Gaza kill at least six, including a 9-year-old girl, as ceasefire talks continue
item.description: Israeli military strikes in the Gaza Strip have killed at least six people, including a nine-year-old girl, according to Palestinian health officials. The attacks occurred on Sunday, targeting a tent ...

item.title: DCEA intensifies anti-drug campaigns in Arusha, 550 arrests made
item.description: The Drugs Control and Enforcement Authority (DCEA) in Tanzania has ramped up efforts to combat drug abuse among public servants, resulting in the arrest of 550 individuals across regions like Arusha, ...

item.title: Calls for National Day to Commemorate 2016 Arbitral Ruling on West Philippine Sea
item.description: Stakeholders are urging President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. to issue an executive order (EO) declaring July 12 as the 'National West Philippine Sea Victory Day' to commemorate the 2016 landmark ruling that...

item.title: Top Countries with Most World Cup Goals in 2026 FIFA Tournament
item.description: As the 2026 FIFA World Cup nears its end, Brazil still lead the all-time goal chart with 247 goals, despite being knocked out by Norway. Germany are second with 243 goals, while Argentina, France, Spa...

item.title: Blog Post on Nuclear Issues, Politics, and Webinars in the USA
item.description: This blog post from July 12, 2026, by Christina Macpherson highlights nuclear-related topics within the context of U.S. politics and environmental concerns. The author discusses a webinar titled 'Atom...

item.title: British couple rescued from Spain wildfire ravine after severe burns
item.description: A British couple has been rescued from a ravine in Spain after suffering severe burns during wildfires that devastated the Almeria province. The pair, found semi-conscious and critically injured, were...

item.title: YouTuber charged with trespassing after filming fugitive cop killer's hideout
item.description: A 43-year-old man has been charged with trespassing after filming the secret hideout of Dezi Freeman, a fugitive who killed two police officers in 2025. The incident occurred at a property on Murray R...

item.title: Tanzania's Government and Private Sector Collaborate to Boost Investment Through Vision 2050
item.description: Tanzania continues to attract local and international investors due to its commitment to peace and stability, with government officials emphasizing the importance of creating a business-friendly envir...

item.title: Private Melbourne development offers affordable rentals without public subsidy
item.description: A new privately funded build-to-rent project in Melbourne's eastern suburbs, developed by Local, has introduced 33 affordable rental units at below-market rates without relying on public subsidies. Th...

item.title: Sen. Legarda Advocates for Protecting Fishers' Maritime Rights in West Philippine Sea
item.description: As the Philippines commemorates the 10th anniversary of the 2016 arbitral ruling on the South China Sea, Senator Loren Legarda reiterated the nation's commitment to upholding maritime rights through i...

item.title: A youth pastor reflects on 20 years since his wife's tragic death in Utah
item.description: The article recounts the story of a youth pastor who is revisiting the tragic event of 20 years ago when his wife fell to her death in Utah. It explores the emotional journey of the pastor as he grapp...

item.title: Manqoba Mngqithi's transfer to Kaizer Chiefs blocked by external interference
item.description: Manqoba Mngqithi, the Tanzanian champions' head coach, has confirmed that his potential move to Kaizer Chiefs was blocked by external interference before negotiations could begin. Despite genuine inte...

item.title: Tips for Engaging YouTube Comments
item.description: The article explores strategies for creating YouTube comments that boost engagement. It highlights the importance of authenticity, humor, and relevance in comments to spark conversations and attract l...

item.title: Chef Bal Shares Samosa Kale Chaat Recipe for a Unique Twist on Traditional Snacks
item.description: This article presents a detailed recipe for Samosa Kale Chaat, a fusion dish combining Indian samosa with a vibrant kale chaat. The recipe includes step-by-step instructions for preparing the dough, f...

item.title: Dyonne Rachael Bromstad and Her Siblings: A Family Profile
item.description: The article explores the life of Dyonne Rachael Bromstad, an American interior designer, and her relationship with her famous sibling, David Reed Bromstad. David, known for winning HGTV's Design Star ...
